A

acceptOrdersDuringWorkingHours() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.OrderDepartment
Accepts configured orders during working hours and closes the incoming queue afterwards.

B

Baker - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin
Worker that prepares orders and places finished pizzas into storage.
Baker(long, BlockingList<Order>, BlockingList<Order>) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Baker
Creates a baker worker from raw queues.
Baker(long, OrderDepartment) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Baker
Creates a baker worker.
BlockingList<T> - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin
Thread-safe bounded list with blocking put and take operations.
BlockingList(int) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.BlockingList
Creates a blocking list with a fixed capacity.

C

close() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.BlockingList
Closes the list and wakes all waiting threads.
closeOrders() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.OrderDepartment
Closes the incoming order queue.
closeStorage() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.OrderDepartment
Closes finished-order storage.
completeDelivery(List<Order>) - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.OrderDepartment
Prints delivered statuses for the completed courier trip.
Courier - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin
Worker that takes ready orders from storage and delivers them in batches.
Courier(int, BlockingList<Order>) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Courier
Creates a courier worker from raw storage.
Courier(int, OrderDepartment) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Courier
Creates a courier worker.

G

getArrivalTimeMs() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Order
Returns the planned order arrival time.
getBakerSpeeds() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.PizzeriaConfig
Returns configured baker speeds.
getCourierCapacities() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.PizzeriaConfig
Returns configured courier bag capacities.
getDeliveryTimeMs() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Order
Returns the delivery duration for this order.
getId() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Order
Returns the order identifier.
getOrders() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.PizzeriaConfig
Returns configured orders.
getWarehouseCapacity() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.PizzeriaConfig
Returns the storage capacity.
getWorkDurationMs() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.PizzeriaConfig
Returns the workday duration.

O

Order - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin
Represents a customer order with arrival and delivery timings.
Order(int, long, long) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Order
Creates an order description.
OrderDepartment - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin
Owns order queues and all order-related status output.
OrderDepartment(int, int) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.OrderDepartment
Creates an order department for tests or standalone worker execution.
OrderDepartment(PizzeriaConfig) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.OrderDepartment
Creates an order department from the full pizzeria configuration.
OrderDepartment(PizzeriaConfig, int, int) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.OrderDepartment
Creates an order department with explicit queue capacities.

P

parse(String) - Static method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.PizzeriaConfigParser
Reads and parses a configuration file.
Pizzeria - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin
Coordinates a full pizzeria workday simulation.
Pizzeria(PizzeriaConfig) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Pizzeria
Creates a simulation instance from an immutable configuration.
PizzeriaConfig - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin
Immutable configuration of a pizzeria workday simulation.
PizzeriaConfig(long, int, List<Long>, List<Integer>, List<Order>) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.PizzeriaConfig
Creates a validated simulation configuration.
PizzeriaConfigParser - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin
Parses a pizzeria configuration from a JSON file.
placeCookedOrderInStorage(Order) - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.OrderDepartment
Stores a finished order and prints storage-related statuses.
put(T) - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.BlockingList
Adds an element, waiting until space becomes available if needed.
put(T, Runnable) - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.BlockingList
Adds an element, optionally invoking a callback once before the thread blocks.

R

ru.nsu.kiryushin - package ru.nsu.kiryushin
 
run() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Baker
Continuously cooks incoming orders until the order queue is exhausted or closed.
run() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Courier
Continuously loads orders, delivers them, and stops when storage is closed and empty.
runDay() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.Pizzeria
Runs the pizzeria for one simulated workday.

S

startWorkers() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.WorkerDepartment
Starts all configured bakers and couriers.
submitOrder(Order) - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.OrderDepartment
Adds a new incoming order and prints its accepted status.

T

take() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.BlockingList
Removes and returns the first available element.
takeMultiple(int) - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.BlockingList
Removes up to max elements from the head of the list.
takeOrderForCooking() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.OrderDepartment
Returns the next order for a baker and prints its cooking status.
takeOrdersForDelivery(int) - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.OrderDepartment
Returns orders for a courier trip and prints loading statuses.

W

waitForWorkers() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.WorkerDepartment
Waits for bakers to finish, closes storage, and then waits for couriers.
WorkerDepartment - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin
Owns worker threads and their lifecycle.
WorkerDepartment(PizzeriaConfig, OrderDepartment) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.WorkerDepartment
Creates a worker department from the pizzeria configuration.
